issues.title: Move GPOs out of category "Windows Components"
issues.suggested_reply: Needs-Triage — community PR #337 touches policies/IntelligentTerminal.admx and policies/en-US/IntelligentTerminal.adml (policy/GPO metadata; owner unknown because policies/** is unmapped and the team table is empty). 7-day SLA clock started 2026-06-22; contributor asked for status on 2026-07-06. Worth a first pass?

issues.title: WTA ACP 0.10→1.0 migration
issues.suggested_reply: Hi @DDKinger, CI is failing on `check-spelling` — quick scan suggests it may be the active spelling/check annotation rather than merge conflicts. Could you take a look at https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/runs/85529229441? If it's flaky, push an empty commit (`git commit --allow-empty -m "ci: rerun"`) to re-run.

issues.title: Setting delegateAgent to a different agent than acpAgent crashes master process (wta-master pipe connect failure)
issues.suggested_reply:
Sorry you hit a crash @Aust-aa-36. For crashes specifically we need the backend diagnostic data, which you can capture via Feedback Hub: <https://aka.ms/intelligent-terminal-feedback>. Pick the matching category, hit "Share My Feedback" after submitting, and paste the link here.

Without that we can't correlate the crash to a specific stack trace.

PS: Because this looks like the WTA master failing during startup, a zipped copy of `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds) would also help.
